---
title: "Optimal Transport: Theory, Computation, and Applications Across Domains"
subtitle: "CROSS-002 | Cross-Cutting Methods"
description: "Optimal transport provides a geometry on the space of probability distributions. This emerging field connects analysis, geometry, probability, and computation with applications in every domain of this curriculum."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Optimal Transport: Theory, Computation, and Applications Across Domains

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
